entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary crop studied for disease distribution in Northern Malawi

entities.name: MZUZU
entities.description: An Agricultural Development Division in Northern Malawi where groundnut diseases were surveyed

entities.name: KARONGA
entities.description: An Agricultural Development Division in Northern Malawi where groundnut diseases were surveyed

entities.name: NORTHERN MALAWI
entities.description: The region in Malawi where the groundnut disease survey was conducted

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A common groundnut disease caused by Cercospora arachidicola

entities.name: CERCOSPORA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes early leaf spot in groundnuts

entities.name: MYCOSPHAERELLA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: A taxonomic synonym or related form of Cercospora arachidicola

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A severe groundnut disease caused by Phaeoisariopsis personata

entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot in groundnuts

entities.name: MYCOSPHAERELLA BERKELEYI
entities.description: A taxonomic synonym or related form of Phaeoisariopsis personata

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A severe groundnut disease caused by Puccinia arachidis

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in groundnuts

entities.name: LEAF SCORCH
entities.description: A groundnut disease caused by Leptosphaerulina crassiasca

entities.name: LEPTOSPHAERULINA CRASSIASCA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes leaf scorch in groundnuts

entities.name: WEB BLOTCH
entities.description: A groundnut disease caused by Phoma arachidicola

entities.name: PHOMA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes web blotch in groundnuts

entities.name: DIDYMOSPHAERIA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: A taxonomic synonym or related form of Phoma arachidicola

entities.name: PHYLLOSTICTA LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A groundnut disease caused by Phyllosticta arachidis-hypogaea

entities.name: PHYLLOSTICTA ARACHIDIS-HYPOGAEA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes phyllosticta leaf spot in groundnuts

entities.name: ANTHRACNOSE
entities.description: A groundnut disease caused by Colletotrichum sp.

entities.name: COLLETOTRICHUM SP
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes anthracnose in groundnuts

entities.name: SUNFLOWER YELLOW BLOTCH UMBRAVIRUS
entities.description: A virus identified in the surveyed groundnut fields

entities.name: WITCHES' BROOM
entities.description: A disease symptom observed in plants within the surveyed fields

entities.name: WITCHWEED
entities.description: A weed (Alectra vogelii) recorded in almost all surveyed groundnut fields

entities.name: ALECTRA VOGELII
entities.description: The scientific name for witchweed

entities.name: SURVEY
entities.description: The process of determining the distribution and importance of groundnut diseases
